pom.xml.general_idea: Set Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 APIs and bytecode, failing to utilize Java 17 features or potentially causing runtime issues if Java 17-specific APIs are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag for Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using the release flag ensures strict compliance with the target JDK version, preventing accidental usage of APIs not available in Java 17.
